response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and deep exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), and testing frameworks — plus a proven track record in building scalable, user-focused systems. His open-source contributions and workshop leadership demonstrate exceptional communication and technical depth, though his German language skill is limited and Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling development experience
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in testing/DevOps practices
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly listed in experience or skills
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Vitest mentioned in job but not explicitly called out in resume
